description_long: This tattoo shop features a modern, angular design with a sharply sloped, dark roof and a rectangular footprint. The exterior walls are primarily smooth and monochromatic, with a stark contrast between the black roof and the lighter wall sections. The building sits on a raised, tiered platform with geometric, stepped patterns that extend outward, creating a dramatic base. There are no visible windows or doors, and the facade is minimalist, lacking any decorative elements or signage. The overall structure appears solid and compact, with clean lines and a focus on geometric form. The absence of visible ornamentation or transparency gives the shop a private, exclusive feel.
description: A modern, angular tattoo shop with a sharply sloped black roof and minimalist, monochrome walls, set on a geometric, tiered platform.
description_view_0: The shop is seen from the side, highlighting the sloped roof and the contrast between the black roof and light walls, with the stepped platform clearly visible.
description_view_1: The front view shows the full width of the building, with the dark roof dominating and the stepped platform extending outward; no doors or windows are visible.
description_view_2: This side view mirrors the first, emphasizing the angular roof and the clean, uninterrupted wall surfaces, with the geometric base prominent.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the back of the building, with the roof's angular pattern and the tiered platform continuing around the structure.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern with minimalist, geometric features and a sharply sloped roof.
